name: Adminor Aktiebolag
notes:
## Adminor AB — AS51701

Adminor is a Swedish network operator and hosting provider based in Stockholm. We offer co-location, VPS, dedicated servers and more in our facilities.
We operate our own AS with IPv4 and IPv6 transit and peering.

### Peering Policy
Open peering policy. We welcome peering with networks of all sizes.
Peering requests can be sent to noc@adminor.net.

### Technical Requirements
- Routeable prefix minimum: /24 (IPv4), /48 (IPv6)
- No-export and blackhole communities honored
- RPKI/ROV enforced — INVALID routes are rejected
- We do not accept default routes
- We do not accept bogons or our own prefixes

### Transit Providers
- Portlane / Glesys (AS42708)
- Layermesh

### IXP Presence
- SONIX (Stockholm)

### Facility Presence
- KN7, Stockholm
- VästbergaDC, Stockholm
- SolnaB15, Solna

### BGP Communities
We support BGP communities for traffic engineering (prepend, no-export)
toward specific peers and transit providers. Contact NOC for details.

### Contact
NOC: noc@adminor.net
Peering: noc@adminor.net
